case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. EDI ROMAN CASTILLO GONZALEZ

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-26-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-26-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY NARALLANI SANCHEZ, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT EDI ROMAN CASTILLO GONZALEZ IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 50.00 - SERVED MAY-06-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CASTILLO GONZALEZ, EDI ROMAN

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-26-2019 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CASTILLO GONZALEZ, EDI ROMAN $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,600.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
